task: Add a worker-lease and retry-scheduler boundary preview for the Pro Rust product core: define shared non-executing worker lease, retry, and idempotency boundary payloads, expose a read-only API endpoint, render a compact worker-lease/retry panel in the graph-first web shell, and synchronize Pro docs/evidence. Do not add real workers, provider execution, queue persistence, Redis/database/event-store connections, credential access, auth enforcement, quota/billing mutation, OSS runtime changes, package dependencies, or live provider calls.
securityRequirements: Mention auth, secrets, permissions, and sensitive-data handling explicitly.
dependencyRequirements: Mention new or upgraded packages, lockfile changes, and dependency impact explicitly.
performanceRequirements: Mention performance, latency, or load impact in evidence.
understandingRequirements: Explain the main tradeoffs so future maintainers can follow the change.
continuityRequirements: Mention reuse targets and any deliberate continuity break in evidence.
